zh.lifeSummary: 當John Talbot of Salesbury於大約1389年出生在英國越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯時，他的父親Sir William Talbot30歲，母親Thomasine Raleigh25歲。他於大約1416年與Isabella de Clitheroe結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1449年4月18日在英國藍卡爾享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Talbot of Salesbury于大约1389年出生在英国越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯时，他的父亲Sir William Talbot30岁，母亲Thomasine Raleigh25岁。他于大约1416年与Isabella de Clitheroe结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1449年4月18日在英国藍卡爾享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Talbot of Salesbury was born about 1389, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir William Talbot, was 30 and his mother, Thomasine Raleigh, was 25. He married Isabella de Clitheroe about 1416. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 18 April 1449, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Talbot of Salesbury est né environ 1389, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Talbot, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Raleigh, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Clitheroe environ 1416. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1449, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Talbot of Salesbury um 1389 in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Talbot 30 und seine Mutter Thomasine Raleigh 25. Er hat um 1416 Isabella de Clitheroe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. April 1449 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Talbot of Salesbury è nato il circa 1389 nel Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Talbot, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Thomasine Raleigh, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Isabella de Clitheroe circa 1416. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 aprile 1449, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Talbot of Salesburyが約1389年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで生まれた時，父Sir William Talbotは30歳，母Thomasine Raleighは25歳であった。約1416年にIsabella de Clitheroeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1449年4月18日にイギリスランカシュアイアで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Talbot of Salesbury(이)가 대략 1389년 영국 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Talbot(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomasine Raleigh(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1416년 Isabella de Clitheroe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1449년 4월 18일 영국 랭카실르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Talbot of Salesbury nasceu aproximadamente 1389, em Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Talbot, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Raleigh, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Clitheroe aproximadamente 1416. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de abril de 1449, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Talbot of Salesbury родился около 1389 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Talbot было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Raleigh, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Clitheroe около 1416 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 апреля 1449 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Talbot of Salesbury nació aproximadamente 1389, en Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Talbot, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Thomasine Raleigh, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Isabella de Clitheroe aproximadamente 1416. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de abril de 1449, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
